subject: [POLICY] Correct comtainer port in policy-xacml-pdp
commit_message:
[POLICY] Correct comtainer port in policy-xacml-pdp

Wrong port definition leads to missing Service selection

Issue-ID: OOM-3120

Signed-off-by: Andreas Geissler <andreas-geissler@telekom.de>
Change-Id: I0d843f6cff494e9062ee18321c5525499b868dcd
